title: Furrow Merge Policy
description: Schema for schemas/merge-policy.yaml — governs how /furrow:merge resolves file conflicts.

schema_version.description: Policy schema version. Must equal '1.0' for this schema.

protected.description: Paths that are NEVER auto-merged. Any conflict forces human-decides.

path.description: Glob path (fnmatch-style with ** extension) relative to repo root.

machine_mergeable.description: Paths that can be machine-resolved via the named strategy.

path.description: Glob path relative to repo root.

strategy.description: Merge strategy. Only 'sort-by-id-union' is supported in v1.0.

key.description: Field name used as the unique key for union de-duplication.

sort_tuple.description: Ordered list of field names to sort by (LC_ALL=C).

prefer_ours.description: Paths where main wins on conflict (prefer-ours strategy).

path.description: Glob path relative to repo root.

condition.description: Optional additional condition restricting when this rule applies.

always_delete_from_worktree_only.description: Glob patterns for files to delete if they appear only on the worktree side.

overrides.description: Per-deliverable overrides (v1: unused; reserved for future extension).
